About the Department

MENU

The aim of the Health Management is to make students equipped with theoretical knowledge on the following:  public health by analyzing health cases under its social aspects, generate practical politics, planning and applying new projects to improve efficiency of hospitals, and being able to get across with health sector on the international stage.

Objectives

The program also aims to development of public health depends on any health related discipline. The process of planning, assembling, presenting, and evaluating health services is the part of health management which became one of the promising career in the world and also in Turkey. The total credits required for the satisfactory completion of the curriculum are 120 credits. The program additionally requires two internships each enduring 20 work days.
